# Copilot Instructions

## Repository Overview

This repository is dedicated to the conceptual theory of metaphysical structure ("Teoría conceptual de la estructura metafísica"). It is a science-focused project exploring the conceptual and philosophical underpinnings of metaphysical structures.

## Purpose

The project aims to document, develop, and share ideas related to conceptual theory in the domain of metaphysics and science.

## Contribution Guidelines

- Write clearly and precisely, using well-structured language appropriate for academic or scientific content.
- When adding new content, ensure it is consistent with the existing theoretical framework described in the repository.
- Use Spanish or English as appropriate to the context; maintain consistency within each document.
- Keep documentation organized and easy to navigate.

## Content Style

- Favor clear, logical exposition over jargon where possible.
- When introducing new concepts, provide definitions and context.
- Cross-reference related ideas within the repository where applicable.
